home.subtitle: A step-by-step plan for new immigrants: banks, rent, health, work and benefits.

empty.title: Nothing here yet

devUi.title: UI kit v1
devUi.subtitle: Every foundation component. Toggle the theme with the button on the right.

banks.title: Banks & money
banks.description: Open an account, get a card, transfers

openAccount.title: Open a bank account
openAccount.summary: Bring your teudat zehut and teudat oleh. Oleh accounts are often fee-free.

kupatHolim.title: Register with a kupat holim
kupatHolim.summary: Pick a health fund and register within the first days after landing.

onboarding.title: Quick quiz
onboarding.subtitle: 7 questions to assemble a plan for your situation. Answers stay in this browser only.

stage.label: Where are you in the process?

basis.label: On what basis are you making aliyah?

childrenAges.label: How old are the children?
childrenAges.help: Add each child's age — it affects daycare, school and benefits.

arrivalDate.label: When did you land?
arrivalDate.help: Used to compute deadlines — e.g. 90 days to register with a health fund.

flightDate.label: When is your flight?
flightDate.help: If you have a date, we'll flag what to finish before the flight.

city.label: Which city do you live in (or plan to)?

preview.title: Your plan
preview.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}} for your situation. The full plan screen comes later.
preview.empty: No steps match your answers yet — content is still being filled in.
